text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I spent my day off coming up with a brand-new
coffee blend...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I think this blend is one of my finest works...
Would you like to try some with me?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe returns from her productive day
off completely refreshed.
